rationale: Educ. Code §44.035 governs school district building construction contract conditions and is unrelated to residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
quote: After reviewing the uniform general conditions adopted by the Texas Facilities Commission under Section 2166.302, Government Code, a school district may adopt uniform general conditions to be incorporated in all district building construction contracts.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns construction contracts, not homestead exemptions.
